name: Marinated Fiddleheads Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 package Italian salad dressing (Good Seasons brand)
2 cups cooked and drained fiddlehead ferns
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare 1 package of Good Seasons Italian salad dressing mix according to package directions.
2. Pour the dressing over the 2 cups of cooked, drained fiddleheads.
3. Let the fiddleheads marinate in the dressing overnight in the refrigerator.
4. Use the marinated fiddleheads generously in a salad made of crisp lettuce leaves, sliced ripe tomatoes, and chopped scallions.
5. Toss the salad with additional Italian dressing.
6. Serve with seasoned croutons scattered on top of the salad.
